name: rei-yes
prompt: Extreme close-up on eyes. Ice-blue eyes soft, glistening, surrendered. All walls down. The yes visible before spoken. Soft warm lighting, intimate. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: foreheads-touch
prompt: Two-shot profile silhouette. Dark-haired man LEFT, silver-haired woman RIGHT. Foreheads touching, noses almost brushing, breath mingling visible — frost and heat meeting in steam between parted lips. His hands still cupping her face. Her hands risen to grip his wrists. Temperature chaos, hot and cold and cracking and alive. Intimate. About to become more. Warm and cool lighting splitting frame. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

sfx.description: shared breath, warmth and cold dissolving into each other, quiet intimate hum
